Part D sponsor must provide drug 
claims data to CCIPs for those bene-
ficiaries that are enrolled in CCIPs in a 
manner specified by CMS. 
(5) Considerations in pharmacy fees. An 
applicant to become a Part D sponsor 
must— 
(i) Describe in its application how it 
takes into account the resources used 
and time required to implement the 
MTMP it chooses to adopt in estab-
lishing fees for pharmacists or others 
providing MTMP services for covered 
Part D drugs under a Part D plan.
